# GO BACKEND KNOWLEDGE BASE

## OVERVIEW
Go-based Admin API for FLVX. Replaced legacy Spring Boot backend.
**Stack:** Go 1.24, net/http (std lib), GORM + SQLite/PostgreSQL (glebarez/sqlite - CGO-free).

## STRUCTURE
```
go-backend/
├── cmd/paneld/main.go        # Entry point; starts HTTP server + WebSocket
├── internal/
│   ├── http/                 # HTTP layer
│   │   ├── router.go         # Routes (NewServeMux) + Middleware chain
│   │   ├── handler/          # API Handlers (User, Tunnel, Node, etc.)
│   │   ├── middleware/       # JWT, CORS, Logging, Recover
│   │   └── response/         # JSON response helpers
│   ├── store/
│   │   ├── model/model.go    # GORM model structs (single source of truth)
│   │   └── repo/             # Data Access Layer (Repository pattern, GORM)
│   │       ├── repository.go           # Core queries, Open/OpenPostgres, AutoMigrate (83k LOC)
│   │       ├── repository_mutations.go # Mutation helpers (user/node/tunnel/forward CRUD, 43k LOC)
│   │       ├── repository_federation.go # Federation-specific queries
│   │       ├── repository_flow.go      # Flow/forward status queries
│   │       ├── repository_control.go   # Control plane queries
│   │       └── repository_groups.go    # Group management queries
│   └── auth/                 # Auth logic
├── tests/contract/            # Integration/contract tests (14 tests)
├── Dockerfile                # Multi-stage build (golang:1.24-bookworm → debian:bookworm-slim)
└── Makefile                  # Build commands
```

## WHERE TO LOOK
| Task | Location | Notes |
|------|----------|-------|
| **API Routes** | `go-backend/internal/http/router.go` | Registers handlers to `http.ServeMux` |
| **DB Models** | `go-backend/internal/store/model/model.go` | GORM structs with `TableName()` methods |
| **Repository** | `go-backend/internal/store/repo/` | GORM-based queries, all DB ops encapsulated |
| **Auth Middleware** | `go-backend/internal/http/middleware/jwt.go` | Extracts `Authorization` header |
| **WebSocket** | `go-backend/internal/ws/` | Real-time updates (traffic, status) |
| **Contract Tests** | `go-backend/tests/contract/` | Integration tests for auth, federation, tunnels |

## CONVENTIONS
- **GORM ORM**: Uses GORM with `glebarez/sqlite` (CGO-free) and `gorm.io/driver/postgres`.
- **AutoMigrate**: Schema created at startup via `autoMigrateAll()` — no hand-written DDL.
- **TableName()**: All models define explicit `TableName()` returning singular snake_case names.
- **Repository Pattern**: Handlers never access `*gorm.DB` directly — all queries go through `repo.Repository` methods.
- **Standard Lib**: Uses `net/http` for routing (Go 1.22+ patterns).
- **Auth**: Expects raw JWT in `Authorization` header (no `Bearer` prefix).
- **API Envelope**: All responses use `response.R{code, msg, data, ts}` structure.
- **Config**: Loaded from environment variables (see `cmd/paneld/main.go`).
- **SQLite Constraints**: `MaxOpenConns(1)`, WAL mode, busy_timeout=5000.
- **PostgreSQL**: Supported via `DB_TYPE=postgres` and `DATABASE_URL` env vars.

## ANTI-PATTERNS
- **DO NOT** let handlers call `repo.DB()` directly — add a Repository method instead.
- **DO NOT CHANGE** handler signatures without updating `router.go`.
- **DO NOT** use `type:jsonb` or `type:serial` in GORM tags (SQLite incompatible).
- **DO NOT** omit `TableName()` on new models — GORM pluralizes by default.

## COMMANDS
```bash
cd go-backend
go run ./cmd/paneld       # Default: SERVER_ADDR=:6365
go test ./...             # Unit tests
go test ./tests/contract/... # Contract tests
make build
```

609:   const validateForm = (): boolean => {
610:     const newErrors: { [key: string]: string } = {};
611: 
612:     if (!form.name.trim()) {
613:       newErrors.name = "请输入转发名称";
614:     } else if (form.name.length < 2 || form.name.length > 50) {
615:       newErrors.name = "转发名称长度应在2-50个字符之间";
616:     }
617: 
618:     if (!form.tunnelId) {
619:       newErrors.tunnelId = "请选择关联隧道";
620:     }
621: 
622:     // 验证入口端口（可选，如果填写则验证）
623:     if (form.inPort !== null && form.inPort !== undefined) {
624:       const port = Number(form.inPort);
625: 
626:       if (isNaN(port) || port < 1 || port > 65535) {
627:         newErrors.inPort = "端口必须在 1-65535 之间";
628:       }
629:     }
630: 
631:     if (!form.remoteAddr.trim()) {
632:       newErrors.remoteAddr = "请输入远程地址";
633:     } else {
634:       // 验证地址格式
635:       const addresses = form.remoteAddr
636:         .split("\n")
637:         .map((addr) => addr.trim())
638:         .filter((addr) => addr);
639:       const ipv4Pattern =
640:         /^(25[0-5]|2[0-4][0-9]|[01]?[0-9][0-9]?)\.(25[0-5]|2[0-4][0-9]|[01]?[0-9][0-9]?)\.(25[0-5]|2[0-4][0-9]|[01]?[0-9][0-9]?)\.(25[0-5]|2[0-4][0-9]|[01]?[0-9][0-9]?):\d+$/;
641:       const ipv6FullPattern =
642:         /^\[((([0-9a-fA-F]{1,4}:){7}([0-9a-fA-F]{1,4}|:))|(([0-9a-fA-F]{1,4}:){6}(:[0-9a-fA-F]{1,4}|((25[0-5]|2[0-4]\d|1\d\d|[1-9]?\d)(\.(25[0-5]|2[0-4]\d|1\d\d|[1-9]?\d)){3})|:))|(([0-9a-fA-F]{1,4}:){5}(((:[0-9a-fA-F]{1,4}){1,2})|:((25[0-5]|2[0-4]\d|1\d\d|[1-9]?\d)(\.(25[0-5]|2[0-4]\d|1\d\d|[1-9]?\d)){3})|:))|(([0-9a-fA-F]{1,4}:){4}(((:[0-9a-fA-F]{1,4}){1,3})|((:[0-9a-fA-F]{1,4})?:((25[0-5]|2[0-4]\d|1\d\d|[1-9]?\d)(\.(25[0-5]|2[0-4]\d|1\d\d|[1-9]?\d)){3}))|:))|(([0-9a-fA-F]{1,4}:){3}(((:[0-9a-fA-F]{1,4}){1,4})|((:[0-9a-fA-F]{1,4}){0,2}:((25[0-5]|2[0-4]\d|1\d\d|[1-9]?\d)(\.(25[0-5]|2[0-4]\d|1\d\d|[1-9]?\d)){3}))|:))|(([0-9a-fA-F]{1,4}:){2}(((:[0-9a-fA-F]{1,4}){1,5})|((:[0-9a-fA-F]{1,4}){0,3}:((25[0-5]|2[0-4]\d|1\d\d|[1-9]?\d)(\.(25[0-5]|2[0-4]\d|1\d\d|[1-9]?\d)){3}))|:))|(([0-9a-fA-F]{1,4}:){1}(((:[0-9a-fA-F]{1,4}){1,6})|((:[0-9a-fA-F]{1,4}){0,4}:((25[0-5]|2[0-4]\d|1\d\d|[1-9]?\d)(\.(25[0-5]|2[0-4]\d|1\d\d|[1-9]?\d)){3}))|:))|(:(((:[0-9a-fA-F]{1,4}){1,7})|((:[0-9a-fA-F]{1,4}){0,5}:((25[0-5]|2[0-4]\d|1\d\d|[1-9]?\d)(\.(25[0-5]|2[0-4]\d|1\d\d|[1-9]?\d)){3}))|:)))\]:\d+$/;
643:       const domainPattern =
644:         /^[a-zA-Z0-9]([a-zA-Z0-9\-]{0,61}[a-zA-Z0-9])?(\.[a-zA-Z0-9]([a-zA-Z0-9\-]{0,61}[a-zA-Z0-9])?)*:\d+$/;
645: 
646:       for (let i = 0; i < addresses.length; i++) {
647:         const addr = addresses[i];
648: 
649:         if (
650:           !ipv4Pattern.test(addr) &&
651:           !ipv6FullPattern.test(addr) &&
652:           !domainPattern.test(addr)
653:         ) {
654:           newErrors.remoteAddr = `第${i + 1}行地址格式错误`;
655:           break;
656:         }
657:       }
658:     }
659: 
660:     setErrors(newErrors);
661: 
662:     return Object.keys(newErrors).length === 0;
663:   };

859:   // 诊断转发
860:   const handleDiagnose = async (forward: Forward) => {
861:     diagnosisAbortRef.current?.abort();
862:     const abortController = new AbortController();
863:     diagnosisAbortRef.current = abortController;
864: 
865:     setCurrentDiagnosisForward(forward);
866:     setDiagnosisModalOpen(true);
867:     setDiagnosisLoading(true);
868:     setDiagnosisProgress({
869:       total: 0,
870:       completed: 0,
871:       success: 0,
872:       failed: 0,
873:       timedOut: false,
874:     });
875:     setDiagnosisResult({
876:       forwardName: forward.name,
877:       timestamp: Date.now(),
878:       results: [],
879:     });
880: 
881:     try {
882:       let streamErrorMessage = "";
883:       const streamResult = await diagnoseForwardStream(
884:         forward.id,
885:         {
886:           onStart: (payload) => {
887:             const startForwardName =
888:               typeof payload.forwardName === "string" &&
889:               payload.forwardName.trim() !== ""
890:                 ? payload.forwardName
891:                 : forward.name;
892:             const startTotal = Number(payload.total);
893:             const startItems = Array.isArray(payload.items)
894:               ? (payload.items as ForwardDiagnosisResult["results"])
895:               : [];
896:             setDiagnosisResult((prev) => ({
897:               forwardName: startForwardName,
898:               timestamp: Date.now(),
899:               results: startItems.length > 0 ? startItems : prev?.results || [],
900:             }));
901:             if (Number.isFinite(startTotal) && startTotal >= 0) {
902:               setDiagnosisProgress((prev) => ({
903:                 ...prev,
904:                 total: startTotal,
905:               }));
906:             }
907:           },
908:           onItem: ({ result, progress }) => {
909:             setDiagnosisResult((prev) => {
910:               const base: ForwardDiagnosisResult = prev || {
911:                 forwardName: forward.name,
912:                 timestamp: Date.now(),
913:                 results: [],
914:               };
915:               const nextResults = [...base.results];
916:               const existingIndex = nextResults.findIndex(
917:                 (item) =>
918:                   item.description === result.description &&
919:                   item.nodeId === result.nodeId &&
920:                   item.targetIp === result.targetIp &&
921:                   item.targetPort === result.targetPort,
922:               );
923: 
924:               if (existingIndex >= 0) {
925:                 nextResults[existingIndex] = {
926:                   ...result,
927:                   diagnosing: false,
928:                 };
929:               } else {
930:                 nextResults.push({
931:                   ...result,
932:                   diagnosing: false,
933:                 });
934:               }
935:               return {
936:                 ...base,
937:                 timestamp: Date.now(),
938:                 results: nextResults,
939:               };
940:             });
941:             setDiagnosisProgress({
942:               total: progress.total,
943:               completed: progress.completed,
944:               success: progress.success,
945:               failed: progress.failed,
946:               timedOut: Boolean(progress.timedOut),
947:             });
948:           },
949:           onDone: (progress) => {
950:             setDiagnosisProgress({
951:               total: progress.total,
952:               completed: progress.completed,
953:               success: progress.success,
954:               failed: progress.failed,
955:               timedOut: Boolean(progress.timedOut),
956:             });
957:           },
958:           onError: (message) => {
959:             streamErrorMessage = message;
960:           },
961:         },
962:         abortController.signal,
963:       );
964: 
965:       if (streamResult.fallback) {
966:         const response = await diagnoseForward(forward.id);
967: 
968:         if (response.code === 0) {
969:           const resultData = response.data as ForwardDiagnosisResult;
970:           const successCount = resultData.results.filter((r) => r.success).length;
971:           const failedCount = resultData.results.length - successCount;
972:           setDiagnosisResult(resultData);
973:           setDiagnosisProgress({
974:             total: resultData.results.length,
975:             completed: resultData.results.length,
976:             success: successCount,
977:             failed: failedCount,
978:             timedOut: false,
979:           });
980:         } else {
981:           toast.error(response.msg || "诊断失败");
982:           setDiagnosisResult(
983:             buildForwardDiagnosisFallbackResult({
984:               forwardName: forward.name,
985:               remoteAddr: forward.remoteAddr,
986:               description: "诊断失败",
987:               message: response.msg || "诊断过程中发生错误",
988:             }),
989:           );
990:           setDiagnosisProgress({
991:             total: 1,
992:             completed: 1,
993:             success: 0,
994:             failed: 1,
995:             timedOut: false,
996:           });
997:         }
998: 
999:         return;
1000:       }
1001: 
1002:       if (streamErrorMessage) {
1003:         toast.error(streamErrorMessage);
1004:       }
1005:       if (streamResult.timedOut) {
1006:         toast.error("诊断超时（单条30秒 / 整体2分钟），已返回当前结果");
1007:       }
1008:     } catch {
1009:       if (abortController.signal.aborted) {
1010:         return;
1011:       }
1012:       toast.error("网络错误，请重试");
1013:       setDiagnosisResult(
1014:         buildForwardDiagnosisFallbackResult({
1015:           forwardName: forward.name,
1016:           remoteAddr: forward.remoteAddr,
1017:           description: "网络错误",
1018:           message: "无法连接到服务器",
1019:         }),
1020:       );
1021:       setDiagnosisProgress({
1022:         total: 1,
1023:         completed: 1,
1024:         success: 0,
1025:         failed: 1,
1026:         timedOut: false,
1027:       });
1028:     } finally {
1029:       if (diagnosisAbortRef.current === abortController) {
1030:         diagnosisAbortRef.current = null;
1031:       }
1032:       setDiagnosisLoading(false);
1033:     }
1034:   };
